import django
from django.conf import settings

if not settings.configured:
    settings.configure()
    django.setup()

from django.core.validators import URLValidator
from django.core.exceptions import ValidationError

def test_mixed_case_ipv6():
    validator = URLValidator()
    
    # Valid IPv6 URLs with mixed-case hex digits
    urls = [
        'http://[2001:db8:85a3:0000:0000:8A2E:0370:7334]/',
        'http://[2001:DB8:85A3:0000:0000:8A2E:0370:7334]/',
        'http://[2001:db8:85a3::8A2E:0370:7334]/',
    ]
    
    for url in urls:
        print(f"Testing URL: {url}")
        try:
            validator(url)
            print(f"SUCCESS: {url} is valid")
        except ValidationError:
            print(f"FAILURE: {url} is invalid")
            raise

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        test_mixed_case_ipv6()
        print("All tests passed!")
    except ValidationError:
        print("Test failed due to ValidationError")
        sys.exit(1)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"An error occurred: {e}")
        sys.exit(1)

from django.conf import settings

if not settings.configured:
    settings.configure()
    django.setup()

from django.core.validators import URLValidator
from django.core.exceptions import ValidationError

def test_mixed_case_ipv6():
    validator = URLValidator()
    
    # Valid IPv6 URLs with mixed-case hex digits
    urls = [
        'http://[2001:db8:85a3:0000:0000:8A2E:0370:7334]/',
        'http://[2001:DB8:85A3:0000:0000:8A2E:0370:7334]/',
        'http://[2001:db8:85a3::8A2E:0370:7334]/',
        'http://[2001:DB8:85A3:0000:0000:8A2E:0370:7334]',
    ]
    
    for url in urls:
        print(f"Testing URL: {url}")
        try:
            validator(url)
            print(f"SUCCESS: {url} is valid")
        except ValidationError:
            print(f"FAILURE: {url} is invalid")
            raise

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        test_mixed_case_ipv6()
        print("All tests passed!")
    except ValidationError:
        print("Test failed due to ValidationError")
        sys.exit(1)
